title: ARCHIVED - Saskatchewan - 2020 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Saskatchewan - 2020 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Saskatchewan tax Form  SK428 - Saskatchewan Tax and Credits Use        this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return Optional: Saskatchewan  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  SK428 - Saskatchewan Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Saskatchewan tax  and credits

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet for the return Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form  SK428 - Saskatchewan Tax and Credits Use        this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return
- Optional: Saskatchewan  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet  SK428 - Saskatchewan Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Saskatchewan tax  and credits
- Saskatchewan  Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet  SK428 - Saskatchewan Use  this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Saskatchewan tax  and credits
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020 Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020 Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive Saskatchewan Schedule  SK(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule  SK(S11) - Saskatchewan Tuition and Education Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) in 2020
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP and PRPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment for 2020
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive
- Schedule  SK(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule  SK(S11) - Saskatchewan Tuition and Education Amounts
- Send us your paper return or use another method to file Print and mail your paper return Where to mail your paper T1 return Mailing addresses for: Canadian residents Non-residents File online or use another option Find a way to file your taxes Other methods to file like: Certified tax software
									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
